description.ko: 데이터 손상의 브루탈리즘적 표현으로, 완벽한 흑요석 구체가 혼란스럽지만 수학적으로 정밀한 기하학적 폭발로 산산조각 나는 모습을 담았습니다.
description.en: A brutalist representation of data corruption, where a perfect obsidian sphere shatters into a chaotic yet mathematically precise geometric explosion.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Voxel Defragmentation.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian sphere suspended in a sterile #FFFFFF void, undergoing a controlled geometric collapse into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. The composition is sliced by intense digital glitch artifacts, horizontal pixel sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes intersect with digital scanlines. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the cold elegance of systematic data corruption.
